summary: Iteration 233: Weekly Performance Report and Alert Dashboard/Action Center - All tests passed. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified. Both new pages load correctly at /admin/reports/weekly-performance and /admin/reports/alerts. Both pages are correctly nested under 'Reports & Analytics' in the sidebar (NOT as top-level sections). All three roles (admin, sales_manager, finance_manager) can access both pages. PDF/CSV exports, week navigation, alert filters, Scan for Alerts, and Mark as Resolved functionality all work correctly. No duplicate sidebar links found.

tests: Response has executive_summary with revenue, orders_completed, margin_pct, avg_rating, discounts_given, net_profit
Response has sales_performance with top_performers, under_performers, total_deals, pipeline_value
Response has financial_summary with collected, pending_payments, outstanding, commission_payable
Response has period with start/end dates
weeks_back parameter changes report period correctly
Response has kpis with critical, warning, open, resolved counts
Admin can access weekly performance report
Sales Manager can access weekly performance report
Finance Manager can access weekly performance report

components_verified.title: Weekly Business Performance
components_verified.kpi_row: 6 cards (Revenue, Orders, Margin, Avg Rating, Discounts, Net Profit)
components_verified.team_metrics: Total Deals, Pipeline Value, Conversion Rate

components_verified.title: Action Center
components_verified.subtitle: Monitor, prioritize, and resolve business alerts

tests: Weekly Performance link appears under Reports & Analytics
Action Center link appears under Reports & Analytics
Links NOT appearing as top-level sections
PDF export button enabled and clickable
CSV export button enabled and clickable
Scan for Alerts button triggers alert generation
Mark as Resolved button visible in expanded alert

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 233 added Weekly Performance Report page at /admin/reports/weekly-performance and Alert Dashboard/Action Center at /admin/reports/alerts. Both pages are nested under 'Reports & Analytics' in the sidebar. The Weekly Performance endpoint aggregates all business data for a week including executive summary KPIs, sales performance (top/under performers), financial summary, customer experience, product intelligence, procurement insights, risk alerts, and action recommendations. The Alert Dashboard extends the existing alert system with priority-based sorting (Critical > Warning > Info > Resolved), filters by severity/type/status, expandable alert cards with recommended actions, and resolve functionality. All management roles (admin, sales_manager, finance_manager) can access both pages. PDF and CSV exports work on both pages.
